heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 283k Authorization of appropriations

children.heading: Capital stock of Inter-American Development Bank
children.label: a Capital stock of Inter-American Development Bank
children.text: There is hereby authorized to be appropriated, without fiscal year limitation, for payment of the increased United States subscription to the capital stock of the Inter-American Development Bank, $411,760,000.

children.heading: Fund for Special Operations of the Inter-American Development Bank
children.label: b Fund for Special Operations of the Inter-American Development Bank
children.text: There is hereby authorized to be appropriated, for payment of the increased United States subscription to the Fund for Special Operations of the Inter-American Development Bank, $50,000,000.
